name: the supported render mappings span all four serialization formats the emitter implements: json, yaml, toml and ini
command: ruby -ryaml -rset -e 'c=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; f=c.values.map{|v| v["render"]}.compact.select{|r| r["supported"]!=false}.map{|r| r["fmt"]}.to_set; need=["json","yaml","toml","ini"].to_set; exit((need-f).empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo supported-spans-four-formats 1>&2
